name: cyboflow
description: Cyboflow - Multi-session AI code assistant manager built on Crystal

scripts.electron-dev: concurrently "pnpm run --filter frontend dev" "wait-on http://localhost:4521 && electron ."
scripts.electron-dev:custom: concurrently "pnpm run --filter frontend dev" "wait-on http://localhost:4521 && electron ."
scripts.build: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run build:electron
scripts.build:mac: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.build:mac:universal: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --universal --publish never
scripts.build:mac:x64: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --x64 --publish never
scripts.build:mac:arm64: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --publish never
scripts.build:mac:ci: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.release:mac: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --publish always
scripts.release:mac:universal: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --universal --publish always
scripts.canary:mac: node scripts/prepare-canary.js && CANARY_BUILD=true pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run inject-build-info && node scripts/configure-build.js && electron-builder --mac --publish always --config.releaseInfo.releaseNotes="Canary build from main branch"
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm run electron:rebuild && pnpm run build:main
